_comment: Species: Spirit Rabbit (灵兔) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Spirit Rabbit

canonical.appearance: Small rabbit 0.3 m, fur white-silver, eyes glow with spirit-light
canonical.size: 0.3 m adult, 2 jin; ancient 0.8 m, 20 jin
canonical.behavior: Timid; cultivates by absorbing dawn-light; prey for many predators
canonical.habitat: Spirit herb hills, dawn-aspected valleys, forests
canonical.relationships: Prey for wind wolves, mountain lions, foxes
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: No alchemy value — common beast with no condensed inner core
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: spirit_rabbit — common beast, no condensed inner core

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
